errors.kb_name_too_long: Filename too long: "{name}". Keep it within ~100 ASCII chars or ~50 CJK chars.

errors.builtin_skill_not_editable: Marketplace skills cannot be edited through chat
errors.agent_disabled: The agent bound to this conversation is disabled — re-enable it or switch conversation.

errors.skill_write_failed: Write failed (invalid path or skill not found)
process.skill.final_no_changes: No skill content was written. Check the process details.
image_gen.no_capable_model: No image-generation capable model is configured. Please add an OpenAI or Google API key (subscription/OAuth credentials cannot access image generation).
oauth.minimax.waiting: Waiting for MiniMax authorization to complete…
oauth.minimax.timeout: MiniMax OAuth timed out. Please try again.
oauth.minimax.response_missing_fields: MiniMax OAuth response is missing user_code / verification_uri
oauth.minimax.state_mismatch: MiniMax OAuth state validation failed (possible CSRF attack or corrupted session)
oauth.minimax.refresh_missing_fields: MiniMax refresh_token response is missing fields
skills.errors.name_too_long: Skill name is too long (max 60 English chars or 30 Chinese/Japanese chars)
skills.errors.name_invalid: Skill name must start with a letter and may contain English letters, digits, underscores (_), and hyphens (-); spaces are not allowed
skills.errors.skill_exists: Skill "{name}" already exists. Please choose another name.
skills.errors.builtin_conflict: Skill name "{name}" conflicts with a marketplace skill. Please choose another name.
skills.errors.validation_blocked: Skill content failed quality validation — creation aborted
skills.errors.create_missing_skill_md: Cannot create skill: missing SKILL.md block
skills.errors.create_missing_name: Cannot create skill: SKILL.md frontmatter is missing the `name` field
skills.errors.path_not_dir: Please select a directory (not a file)
skills.errors.dir_empty: Directory is empty or only contains filtered files
skills.errors.too_large: Total size exceeds limit ({mb} MiB > 10 MiB)
skills.import.seed_dir: Please organize the imported skill files.
errors.contexts.formats_only: Only the following formats are supported: {allowed}
errors.unknown_actor: unknown actor: "{name}" — the name must match an entry in the "Agents list" by its `name` field; also check whether the agent is disabled.
errors.no_model_configured: No model configured. Add an API key on the Settings page or sign in.
errors.model_temporarily_unavailable: The configured model is temporarily unavailable. Try again later, or check credentials / switch models in Settings.
errors.model_config_unavailable: A model is configured, but its credential is not currently usable. Check the API key, sign-in state, or fallback model in Settings.
errors.model_oauth_expired: {provider} authorization has expired. Reauthorize this account in Settings, or switch to a fallback model.
errors.model_credits_insufficient: Not enough credits. Add credits, or switch to an available model in Settings.
errors.model_auth_unavailable: The model credential is not usable. Check the API key, sign-in state, or switch models in Settings.
errors.model_permission_unavailable: This account cannot use the selected model. Check account access or switch models in Settings.
errors.model_not_available: This model is not in the current model list. Select an available model in Settings.
errors.model_rate_limited: The current model is receiving too many requests. Try again later, or switch models in Settings.
errors.model_network_unavailable: The model connection is unstable. Try again later.
errors.request_too_large: The request is too large. Reduce the message or attachments and try again.
model.credential_fallback: The {provider} model credential is no longer valid. Switching to a fallback model so the task can continue; reauthorize or update the credential later in Settings.
cli_agent.missing: ⚠️ Agent “{name}” needs the local CLI “{cli}” which isn’t installed. Install it and retry, or switch the agent to another type.
cli_agent.not_found: ⚠️ Agent “{name}” cannot run: local CLI “{cli}” was not found.
cli_agent.version_unknown: ⚠️ Agent “{name}” cannot run: the version of “{cli}” could not be identified.
cli_agent.version_too_old: ⚠️ Agent “{name}” cannot run: “{cli}” {version} is too old.
chat.agent_load_failed: ⚠️ Agent “{name}” failed to load — its config file may be corrupt or removed. Visit the agents page to inspect, repair, or rebuild it.
chat.dispatch_result_hidden: Result handed back to the commander
chat.turn_limit_reached: Reached the automatic step limit for this run and stopped. Send your message again to continue.
